member.name: T:Drone_Designer.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository
member.summary:
Read-only data access layer for the component database. Loads components.json via ConfigManager, deserializes each entry into the appropriate ComponentSpec subclass, and exposes typed query methods.
This class never writes to the file. All mutation of component data (if ever needed) must go through a separate write-capable service so that the read/write boundary stays explicit.
Usage: Dim repo As New ComponentRepository() Dim motors = repo.GetMotorsWithMinThrust(500)

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository._componentsById
member.summary: All components loaded from JSON, keyed by their unique ID.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository._componentsByCategory
member.summary: All components grouped by category string (lower-invariant).

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.#ctor
member.summary: Loads and deserializes the component database from the path supplied by ConfigManager. Throws if the file is missing, or if the JSON is malformed.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetAll
member.summary: Returns every component in the database as an untyped list. Prefer the typed helpers below for normal use.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetAllByCategory(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all components whose Category matches (case-insensitive). Returns an empty list — never Nothing — when no match.
member.param: One of the canonical category strings: "motor", "esc", "propeller", "flight_controller", "battery", "gps", "telemetry", "camera", "servo", "receiver", "pdb", "airframe_material".

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetById(System.String)
member.summary: Looks up a single component by its unique string ID. Returns Nothing if not found — callers must null-check.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetMotors
member.summary: Returns all motor components as strongly-typed objects.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetESCs
member.summary: Returns all ESC components.

member.summary: Returns all propeller components.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetFlightControllers
member.summary: Returns all flight controller components.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetBatteries
member.summary: Returns all battery components.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetGPSModules
member.summary: Returns all GPS module components.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetTelemetryRadios
member.summary: Returns all telemetry radio components.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetCameras
member.summary: Returns all camera/sensor components.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetServos
member.summary: Returns all servo components.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetReceivers
member.summary: Returns all RC receiver components.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetPowerDistributionBoards
member.summary: Returns all power distribution board components.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetMotorsWithMinThrust(System.Double)
member.summary: Returns motors whose maximum single-motor thrust is at least grams.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetMotorsByKVRange(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns motors within a KV range (RPM per volt), inclusive on both ends.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetBatteriesWithMinCapacity(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns batteries with at least mAh capacity.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetBatteriesByCellCount(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns batteries matching a specific cell count (e.g. 3 for 3S, 4 for 4S).

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetESCsWithMinCurrent(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns ESCs whose continuous current rating meets or exceeds amps.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetComponentsUnderMass(System.Double)
member.summary: Returns all components whose mass does not exceed . Useful for weight-budget filtering across categories.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.GetComponentsForTemperature(System.Double)
member.summary: Returns all components whose operating temperature range covers the given environment temperature in degrees Celsius. Components that have not specified temperature limits are included by default (assumed to handle standard ranges).
member.param: Ambient operating temperature to check against.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository.DeserializeComponents(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes the JSON array into a heterogeneous list of ComponentSpec subclasses. Dispatches on the "category" field of each JSON object so each entry lands in the right concrete type.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.ESCProtocolArrayConverter
member.summary: Reads a JSON string array of ESC protocol names and combines them into a single ESCProtocol Flags enum value via bitwise OR. Handles case-insensitive name matching with common abbreviation variants.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Interfaces.IComponentSelector
member.summary:
Contract for the component selection engine. Takes a fully populated MissionSpecs object and returns a SelectionResult containing the best-fit component for each category, plus any warnings generated during selection.
Keeping this as an interface means the UI layer never depends on a concrete implementation — swap algorithms, mock for testing, or move to a web service later without touching MainForm.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Interfaces.IComponentSelector.SelectComponents(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary: Run the selection algorithm against the component database.
member.param: Mission parameters collected from the UI.
member.returns: A containing one recommended component per category (Nothing if no suitable match exists) and a list of human-readable warnings or notes produced during selection.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow
member.summary: Display-only row object bound to the output DataGridView in MainForm. Every public property name matches a DataGridView column DataPropertyName defined in MainForm.vb so WinForms data binding resolves without any additional column configuration.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.Category
member.summary: Component category label, e.g. "Motor", "Battery (LiPo)", "GPS / GNSS Module". Supplied by the presenter (not read from ComponentSpecs).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.Manufacturer
member.summary: Manufacturer / brand name (e.g. "T-Motor", "Holybro").

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.ModelName
member.summary: Model name or part number (e.g. "F60 Pro IV", "Here3+").

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.MassGrams
member.summary: Component mass in grams. Included in the summary total (recommended rows only).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.NominalVoltage
member.summary: Nominal operating voltage in volts. For batteries: pack nominal voltage (cell count × 3.7 V). For motors/ESCs: mid-point of operating range. For BEC-powered boards: typically 5 V.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.MaxPowerWatts
member.summary: Maximum rated power consumption or output in watts. Sourced from ComponentSpecs.MaxPowerW (engine-confirmed name).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.Dimensions
member.summary: Physical dimensions as a formatted string, e.g. "38 × 38 × 7 mm" or "⌀ 229 mm" for round/circular components.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.Interface
member.summary: Communication interface or electrical protocol, e.g. "UART", "DSHOT600", "I²C / UART", "PPM / SBUS".

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.TempRating
member.summary: Operating temperature range formatted as "−20 to +85 °C". "—" when temperature ratings are not populated in the database.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.SelectionNotes
member.summary: Selection rank within the category: "Recommended" — top-ranked candidate (index 0 from engine). "Alternative 2" / "Alternative 3" — lower-ranked options.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.IsRecommended
member.summary: True for the first (highest-ranked) entry in each component category. Used by DisplaySelectionResult() in MainForm.Logic.vb to highlight the row green. Not bound to any DataGridView column.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.FromComponentSpecs(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentSpecs,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Creates a from a object, adding the category label, selection rank note, and recommendation flag.
Property mapping (ComponentSpecs → ComponentDisplayRow): Manufacturer ← comp.Manufacturer (assumed) ModelName ← comp.ModelName (assumed) MassGrams ← comp.MassGrams (confirmed) NominalVoltage ← comp.NominalVoltageV (assumed; see TODO below) MaxPowerWatts ← comp.MaxPowerW (confirmed via engine) Dimensions ← comp.Dimensions string OR computed from L×W×H / diameter Interface ← comp.Interface (assumed) TempRating ← formatted from OperatingTempMinC + OperatingTempMaxC
TODOs (verify against ComponentSpecs.vb): • If NominalVoltageV doesn't exist, replace with the correct property name or compute as (OperatingVoltageMinV + OperatingVoltageMaxV) / 2. • If OperatingTempMaxC doesn't exist, use OperatingTempMinC only. • If LengthMm / WidthMm / HeightMm / DiameterMm don't exist, remove BuildDimensionsString() or use the Dimensions string property directly.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.NullOrDash(System.String)
member.summary: Returns or "—" when null / whitespace.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.FormatTempRange(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentSpecs)
member.summary:
Formats an operating temperature range for display. • Both limits populated → "−20 to +85 °C" • Min only (OperatingTempMaxC missing or zero) → "−20 °C min" • Neither → "—"
TODO: if ComponentSpecs does not have OperatingTempMaxC, remove the branch that uses it and return only the minimum string.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow.BuildDimensionsString(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentSpecs)
member.summary:
Builds a compact dimension string from ComponentSpecs. Priority order: 1. comp.Dimensions (pre-formatted string, if populated) 2. L × W × H from LengthMm / WidthMm / HeightMm 3. Diameter from DiameterMm (motors, propellers) 4. "—" fallback
TODO: verify property names (LengthMm, WidthMm, HeightMm, DiameterMm) against ComponentSpecs.vb; rename or remove unused branches.

member.summary: Abstract base class for all UAV component specifications. Contains identity, physical, and environmental properties common to every component category. Concrete subclasses add category-specific properties.

member.summary: Unique identifier for this component record. Populated by ComponentRepository when loading from components.json.

member.summary: Brand or manufacturer name (e.g. "T-Motor", "Holybro").

member.summary: Manufacturer part number or SKU. Useful for sourcing and BOM export.

member.summary: True if this is a 4-in-1 ESC board (all four ESCs on one PCB).

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec
member.summary: Specifications for a propeller blade assembly. Diameter and pitch are the primary aerodynamic sizing inputs. DiameterInches and PitchInches are nested under "dimensions" in the JSON and are lifted to top-level properties via OnDeserialized.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.DiameterInches
member.summary: Blade diameter in inches. Populated from dimensions.diameterInches.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.PitchInches
member.summary: Blade pitch in inches. Populated from dimensions.pitchInches.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.BladeCount
member.summary: Number of blades. Populated from dimensions.bladesCount.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.BoreDiameterMm
member.summary: Bore diameter in mm. Populated from dimensions.boreMm.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.Material
member.summary: Primary blade material.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.IsFoldable
member.summary: True if the blades are foldable. JSON field: "isFolding"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.MaxRPM
member.summary: Maximum safe rotational speed in RPM.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.StaticThrustGrams
member.summary: Static thrust in grams (g). JSON field: "maxStaticThrustG"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.StaticThrustTestRPM
member.summary: RPM at which StaticThrustGrams was measured.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.IsClockwiseRotation
member.summary: True if this is a clockwise (CW) rotation prop.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.Efficiency
member.summary: Efficiency proxy (StaticThrustGrams / mass) — computed.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PropellerSpec.OnDeserialized(System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Copies diameter, pitch, blade count, and bore from the nested Dimensions object to top-level properties after JSON deserialisation.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec
member.summary: Specifications for a UAV flight controller / autopilot board. Interface counts (UART, PWM outputs) determine peripheral compatibility.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.Processor
member.summary: CPU / SoC identifier. JSON field: "processorType"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.GyroscopeChip
member.summary: Primary IMU / gyroscope chip. JSON field: "imuPrimary"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.AccelerometerChip
member.summary: Primary accelerometer chip.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasBarometer
member.summary: True if an onboard barometer is present.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.BarometerChip
member.summary: Barometer chip identifier. JSON field: "barometerModel"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasMagnetometer
member.summary: True if an onboard magnetometer is present. JSON field: "hasOnboardMagnetometer"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.UARTCount
member.summary: Number of full hardware UART serial ports.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.I2CBusCount
member.summary: Number of hardware I²C buses. JSON field: "i2cCount"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.SPIBusCount
member.summary: Number of hardware SPI buses. JSON field: "spiCount"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.PWMOutputCount
member.summary: Number of PWM or DSHOT motor/servo output channels.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.AnalogInputCount
member.summary: Number of ADC input channels. JSON field: "analogInputs"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.MaxLoopRateHz
member.summary: Maximum gyro loop rate in Hz. Derived from processor type in OnDeserialized.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasSDCardSlot
member.summary: True if a microSD card slot is present for blackbox logging.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasUSB
member.summary: True if a USB port is present.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasOSD
member.summary: True if the board includes a built-in OSD chip.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasBuiltInVTx
member.summary: True if a built-in VTx is present.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.SupportedFirmware
member.summary: Firmware ecosystem(s) the FC supports.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.FirmwareCompatibility
member.summary: Firmware compatibility as a comma-separated string. JSON field: "firmwareCompatibility" (stored as array in JSON).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.MountingPatternMm
member.summary: Form factor / mounting pattern string. JSON field: "formFactor"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.InputVoltageMin
member.summary: Input supply voltage minimum in Volts (V). JSON field: "inputVoltageMinV"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.InputVoltageMax
member.summary: Input supply voltage maximum in Volts (V). JSON field: "inputVoltageMaxV"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.HasBlackbox
member.summary: True if blackbox logging is available (SD slot present).

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.FlightControllerSpec.OnDeserialized(System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Derives MaxLoopRateHz from processor type after JSON deserialisation. H7 = 8 kHz, F7 = 4 kHz, F4 = 2 kHz, anything else = 1 kHz.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec
member.summary: Specifications for a rechargeable battery pack. The capacity (mAh), cell count (S), and C-rating are the three values most critical to flight-time estimation.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.CapacityMAh
member.summary: Energy capacity in milliamp-hours (mAh).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.CellCount
member.summary: Number of cells wired in series.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.NominalCellVoltageV
member.summary: Nominal pack voltage in Volts (V). JSON field: "nominalVoltageV"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.FullChargeVoltagePerCellV
member.summary: Fully-charged cell voltage in Volts (V). JSON field: "maxChargeVoltageV"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.MinCellVoltageV
member.summary: Safe minimum discharge cell voltage in Volts (V).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.ContinuousCRating
member.summary: Continuous discharge rate in C. JSON field: "dischargeRatingC"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.BurstCRating
member.summary: Peak burst discharge rate in C. JSON field: "burstRatingC"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.Chemistry
member.summary: Cell electrochemistry type.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.FormFactor
member.summary: Physical form factor.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.DischargeConnector
member.summary: Discharge connector type fitted to this pack. JSON field: "mainConnectorType"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.BalanceConnector
member.summary: Balance connector standard. JSON field: "balanceConnectorType"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.LipoCellCount
member.summary: Engine-facing alias: cell count. The selection engine queries LipoCellCount; maps to CellCount.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.NominalPackVoltageV
member.summary: Calculated nominal pack voltage in Volts (V). Read-only derived: CellCount × NominalCellVoltageV.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.BatterySpec.MaxContinuousCurrentAmps
member.summary: Calculated maximum continuous current in Amperes (A). Read-only derived: (CapacityMAh / 1000) × ContinuousCRating.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.CompassChip
member.summary: Compass chip identifier. JSON field: "compassModel"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.TrackingChannels
member.summary: Number of satellite channels the receiver can track.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.DefaultBaudRate
member.summary: Default UART baud rate.

member.summary: GNSS chipset inside the module. JSON field: "chipset"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.GPSModuleSpec.InterfaceTypes
member.summary: Interface types as a comma-separated string. JSON field: "interfaceType" (stored as string array).

member.summary: Current draw in milliamps (mA) at operating voltage. JSON field: "currentDrawMA"

member.summary: Radio carrier frequency in MHz.

member.summary: True if this camera is designed for gimbal mounting.

member.summary: Average power consumption during active recording in Watts (W). JSON field: "powerConsumptionW"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.CameraSpec.OperatingVoltageV
member.summary: Operating supply voltage in Volts (V).

member.summary: True if this is a thermal/infrared sensor. Derived from SensorType containing "Thermal" or "IR".

member.summary: Current draw in Amperes (A). Derived from PowerConsumptionWatts / 5V.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionProfileCategory
member.summary: Defines the primary operational purpose of the UAV mission. Renamed from MissionProfile (Task 11) to avoid shadowing the engine- facing MissionSpecs.MissionProfile property of type MissionProfileType.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionProfileCategory.Surveillance
member.summary: Loitering surveillance — long endurance, quiet, live video.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionProfileCategory.Mapping
member.summary: Photogrammetry / LiDAR mapping — stable hover, precise GPS, wide FOV.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionProfileCategory.Delivery
member.summary: Cargo or package delivery — high thrust, drop mechanism.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionProfileCategory.Inspection
member.summary: Infrastructure inspection — maneuverability, close-range sensing.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionProfileCategory.SearchAndRescue
member.summary: Search and rescue — long range, thermal, loud alarm.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionProfileCategory.Racing
member.summary: Racing / sport — max speed and agility, FPV, minimal payload.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.UAVConfiguration
member.summary: Physical airframe and propulsion topology of the UAV. Determines motor count, ESC count, and structural layout for Module 2.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.UAVConfiguration.Quadcopter
member.summary: 4-motor symmetric layout. Most common.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.UAVConfiguration.Hexacopter
member.summary: 6-motor layout. Redundancy and higher payload.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.UAVConfiguration.Octocopter
member.summary: 8-motor layout. Maximum lift and full motor-loss redundancy.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.UAVConfiguration.FixedWing
member.summary: Fixed wing. Best endurance and range.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.UAVConfiguration.VTOL
member.summary: VTOL hybrid. Combines multirotor hover with fixed-wing cruise.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.UAVConfiguration.Helicopter
member.summary: Single rotor with tail rotor.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.UAVConfiguration.Tricopter
member.summary: Tricopter — 3 motors with a yaw servo.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.OperatingEnvCategory
member.summary: Broad classification of the outdoor/indoor operating environment. Renamed from OperatingEnvironment (Task 11) to avoid shadowing the engine-facing MissionSpecs.OperatingEnvironment property of type EnvironmentType.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.OperatingEnvCategory.OutdoorStandard
member.summary: Standard outdoor. Mild temperature, low humidity, open airspace.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.OperatingEnvCategory.OutdoorHighWind
member.summary: High-wind or coastal. Requires higher thrust margin.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.OperatingEnvCategory.OutdoorCold
member.summary: Arctic or alpine. Low-temperature specs; battery heating may be needed.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.OperatingEnvCategory.OutdoorHot
member.summary: Desert or equatorial. Thermal management critical.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.OperatingEnvCategory.OutdoorWet
member.summary: Rain, fog, or maritime. Waterproofing required.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.OperatingEnvCategory.IndoorGPSDenied
member.summary: Indoor / GPS-denied. Optical flow / lidar needed.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.RegulatoryClass
member.summary: Regulatory or airspace class the mission will operate under. Affects telemetry requirements, fail-safe rules, and Remote ID hardware.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.RegulatoryClass.Recreational
member.summary: Recreational / hobbyist. Minimal regulatory hardware.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.RegulatoryClass.CommercialStandard
member.summary: Commercial standard (FAA Part 107 / EASA A2).

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.RegulatoryClass.BVLOS
member.summary: BVLOS. Redundant telemetry, detect-and-avoid, Remote ID required.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.RegulatoryClass.Military
member.summary: Military / special operations. Treated as custom.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PowerSourceType
member.summary: Power source topology.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PowerSourceType.LiPo
member.summary: Lithium Polymer — lightweight, high discharge.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PowerSourceType.LiIon
member.summary: Lithium-Ion — higher energy density; good for fixed-wing.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PowerSourceType.HydrogenFuelCell
member.summary: Hydrogen fuel cell — long endurance, low noise.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PowerSourceType.HybridFuelCellLiPo
member.summary: Hybrid fuel cell + LiPo buffer.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PowerSourceType.Tethered
member.summary: Tethered power supply — unlimited endurance, limited range.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionProfileType
member.summary: Engine-facing mission profile type used by ComponentSelectionEngine.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.EnvironmentType
member.summary: Engine-facing environment classification. Standard = normal conditions, Harsh = extreme temps, maritime, desert, arctic.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs
member.summary:
Represents a complete set of UAV mission specifications. This is the primary input to ComponentSelectionEngine (Module 1).
Design rules: • Pure data container — no validation or selection logic. • All properties have sensible defaults (typical small commercial quad). • Nullable Double? is used where "not specified" ≠ zero. • Two sets of mission-type and environment properties coexist: - Profile / Environment use the legacy Category enums (UI-facing). - MissionProfile / OperatingEnvironment use the engine enums MissionProfileType / EnvironmentType (defined in ComponentSpecs.vb) and are the properties ComponentSelectionEngine reads directly. Both sets must be kept in sync; BuildMissionSpecs() in MainForm.Logic.vb assigns both sets simultaneously.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.MissionName
member.summary: Human-readable label for this mission configuration.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.Description
member.summary: Optional free-text description. Not used by the selection engine.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.CreatedAtUtc
member.summary: Timestamp (UTC) when this spec set was created.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.FlightEnduranceMinutes
member.summary: Required flight endurance in minutes. Valid range: 1–600 min.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.MaxRangeKm
member.summary: Maximum operational range in kilometres. Valid range: 0.1–500 km.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.CruiseSpeedMs
member.summary: Steady-state cruise speed in m/s. Valid range: 0–120 m/s.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.MaxSpeedMs
member.summary: Maximum design speed in m/s. Must be ≥ CruiseSpeedMs.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.MaxAltitudeMeters
member.summary: Maximum altitude AGL in meters. Valid range: 10–6000 m.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.MaxWindSpeedMs
member.summary: Maximum sustained wind speed in m/s. Valid range: 0–30 m/s. Default ~11 m/s (Beaufort 5).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.MaxTakeoffMassGrams
member.summary: Maximum take-off mass (design limit) in grams, including battery and payload. Engine uses this as target to estimate required thrust and power. Valid range: 100–55,000 g (smallest ready-to-fly quad to heavy industrial). Default: 2000 g (2 kg, typical commercial quadcopter).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.PayloadMassGrams
member.summary: Payload mass in grams (camera, gimbal, sensor, etc.). Default: 0 (no payload).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.PayloadDimensionsMm
member.summary: 3D bounding box for the mission payload (camera gimbal, LiDAR, etc.). Used by Module 2 to size the payload bay on the airframe. Default: unspecified (all zeros).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.MinOperatingTempCelsius
member.summary: Minimum expected ambient temperature in °C. Drives operating temperature range filtering for batteries and other temperature-sensitive components. Default: 0°C (standard commercial outdoor).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.MaxOperatingTempCelsius
member.summary: Maximum expected ambient temperature in °C. Drives operating temperature range filtering and may trigger thermal management (heatsinks, fans) in the SolidWorks CAD model. Default: 45°C (typical commercial outdoor).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.Environment
member.summary: High-level classification of the operating environment. Used by the selection engine to pick weatherproofing levels and derate component ratings. Default: OutdoorStandard (mild, dry outdoor).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.RequiresWaterproofing
member.summary: True if waterproofing / dust sealing is required. Usually triggered when Environment = OutdoorWet or IndoorGPSDenied. Default: False.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.Profile
member.summary: User-selected mission profile (surveillance, mapping, etc.). Mapped from for UI display. Default: Surveillance (typical long-endurance quadcopter mission).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.Configuration
member.summary: User-selected UAV configuration (quad, hex, fixed-wing, etc.). Drives motor count, ESC layout, and structural design in Module 2. Default: Quadcopter.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.PowerSource
member.summary: Power source topology (LiPo, LiIon, fuel cell, etc.).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.Regulatory
member.summary: Regulatory or airspace class the mission will operate under.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.MissionProfile
member.summary: Mission profile using the enum from ComponentSpecs.vb. This is the property read by for all profile-specific selection logic (racing loop rate, mapping resolution, etc.). Set in sync with by BuildMissionSpecs().

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.OperatingEnvironment
member.summary: Operating environment using the enum from ComponentSpecs.vb. This is the property read by for temperature and IP-rating filtering (Harsh vs Standard). Set in sync with by BuildMissionSpecs().

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.MotorCount
member.summary: Number of motors / rotors on this UAV. Read by the engine in MTOW iteration, thrust calculation, and ESC/PDB sizing. Parsed from the Motor Count combo box in BuildMissionSpecs(). Valid multirotor values: 3, 4, 6, 8, 12. Engine normalises any other value to 4.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.RangeKm
member.summary: Maximum operational range in kilometres — engine-facing alias for . ComponentSelectionEngine reads specs.RangeKm for telemetry, receiver, and GPS range margin calculations. Both properties are set to the same value in BuildMissionSpecs(). Unit: km.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.PayloadWeightGrams
member.summary: Payload mass in grams — engine-facing alias for . ComponentSelectionEngine reads specs.PayloadWeightGrams in MTOW iteration and cell-count determination. Both properties are set to the same value in BuildMissionSpecs(). Unit: g.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.ControlLinkRangeKm
member.summary: Control link range (km). Defaults to MaxRangeKm if Nothing.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.RequiresVideoDownlink
member.summary: True if a real-time video downlink is required (triggers VTX selection).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.VideoDownlinkRangeKm
member.summary: Minimum video downlink range in km. Relevant only if RequiresVideoDownlink.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.RequiresTelemetry
member.summary: True if a MAVLink telemetry data link is required.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.RequiresRemoteID
member.summary: True if ADS-B In or Remote ID hardware is required.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.RequiresAutopilot
member.summary: True if autonomous waypoint navigation is required.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.RequiresOpticalFlow
member.summary: True if optical flow / downward sensor is needed for GPS-denied hover.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.RequiresObstacleAvoidance
member.summary: True if obstacle avoidance sensors are required.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.ObstacleAvoidanceDirections
member.summary: Number of obstacle-avoidance sensor directions (1, 3, or 6).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.RequiresDualGPS
member.summary: True if dual (redundant) GPS receivers are required.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.RequiresParachute
member.summary: True if a parachute recovery system should be included.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.RequiredIPRating
member.summary: Required IP rating string (e.g. "IP54"). Empty = no requirement.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs.#ctor
member.summary: Initialises a MissionSpecs instance with all default values. Defaults represent a typical small commercial quadcopter surveillance mission.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PayloadDimensions
member.summary: Bounding box dimensions of the mission payload in millimetres. Used by SolidWorks automation (Module 2) to size the payload bay cavity. All three values default to 0, meaning "unspecified."

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PayloadDimensions.LengthMm
member.summary: Payload length (fore–aft axis) in mm.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PayloadDimensions.WidthMm
member.summary: Payload width (lateral axis) in mm.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PayloadDimensions.HeightMm
member.summary: Payload height (vertical axis) in mm.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Models.PayloadDimensions.IsSpecified
member.summary: True if all three dimensions have been specified (non-zero).

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine
member.summary:
Core component selection engine — Tasks 7, 8, and 9.
TASK 7 (weight and thrust): 1. Estimate MTOW via iterative fixed-point solver. 2. Derive per-motor thrust requirement at 2:1 TWR baseline. 3. Select motors and propellers from repository.
TASK 8 (power system): 4. Calculate total current draw from selected motors. 5. Determine required battery cell count (voltage) and capacity (mAh). 6. Select battery packs from repository that meet voltage, capacity, and C-rating needs. 7. Select ESCs rated above each motor's peak current. 8. Select a power distribution board (PDB) rated for the full system current.
TASK 9 (avionics and communications): 9. Build an AvionicsBudget context object from Task 8 power budget and mission specs. 10. Select a flight controller compatible with pack voltage, mission profile, and environment. 11. Select a GPS/GNSS module meeting the accuracy tier required by the mission profile. 12. Select a telemetry radio with sufficient link range (range × 1.25 margin). 13. Select a receiver with sufficient control range (range × 1.50 margin). 14. Select a camera/sensor matched to mission type (resolution, thermal, FPV). 15. Tally realized avionics current draw across selected components for UI feedback.
Architecture notes: - No UI references; all inputs/outputs are plain data objects. - Repository is injected — swap JSON, SQLite, or mock freely. - Intermediate result types (MtowEstimate, PowerBudget, AvionicsBudget, etc.) are passed between steps so SelectComponents() reads as a linear pipeline. - All constants and empirical factors are named and documented so future chats can tune them without hunting through arithmetic.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.#ctor(Drone_Designer.ComponentRepository)
member.summary: Constructor — inject the component repository.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.AirframeMassTable
member.summary: Estimated airframe + hardware mass (grams) keyed by motor count. Source: averaged over popular mid-class carbon frames (2023-2024).

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.MtowSafetyFactor
member.summary: Multiplier applied to calculated MTOW before thrust sizing. 10% accounts for weight growth during iterative design.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.QuadThrustToWeightRatio
member.summary: Minimum thrust-to-weight ratio for a stable quadrotor. 2.0 = adequate hover margin + moderate agility. Racers: 4.0+. Endurance builds: as low as 1.6 with calm flight profile.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.LipoCellNominalV
member.summary: Nominal LiPo cell voltage (V). Full charge = 4.20 V; storage = 3.85 V; cutoff = 3.50 V. 3.7 V is the standard nominal used in datasheet ratings.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.LipoMaxDod
member.summary: Maximum recommended depth-of-discharge for LiPo cells. 80% usable means we stop drawing at 20% remaining capacity to preserve cycle life.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.LipoEnergyDensityWhPerKg
member.summary: Conservative LiPo gravimetric energy density (Wh/kg). Used in MTOW iteration before an actual pack is chosen. Typical 4S 45C packs: 120-145 Wh/kg. 130 is a safe midpoint.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.HoverCurrentFraction
member.summary:
Fraction of full-throttle current drawn at hover for a 2:1 TWR build.
Derivation: Hover thrust = MTOW; full-throttle thrust = 2 x MTOW. Thrust proportional to RPM^2; current proportional to RPM^3 / KV^2. => hover current fraction ~= (0.5)^1.5 = 0.354 theoretically. Empirical bench data for 5"-7" quads shows 0.40-0.50 due to iron losses and non-ideal prop loading. Using 0.45 as midpoint.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.AvionicCurrentDrawA
member.summary:
Fixed avionics current draw (A) used as an early estimate in the Task 8 power budget, before actual avionics are selected in Task 9.
After Task 9 runs, AvionicsBudget.RealizedCurrentA replaces this figure for display purposes. The power budget itself is not recalculated (avionics is a small fraction of total system current and the 10% MTOW safety factor absorbs the delta), but a future refinement pass could call CalculatePowerBudget() a second time using RealizedCurrentA.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.CapacityMargin
member.summary: Capacity margin added on top of calculated minimum (fraction). 20% covers throttle spikes, wind, and battery capacity aging.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.CRatingHeadroomFactor
member.summary: Minimum C-rating headroom above the calculated peak C-rate (multiplier). Example: peak demand = 18 C => require pack rated >= 18 x 1.25 = 22.5 C. Prevents cell sag and overheating under burst loads.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.EscCurrentHeadroom
member.summary: ESC continuous current headroom above motor peak draw (multiplier). 1.25 = 25% thermal safety margin for sustained flight. Increase to 1.50 for long-endurance or harsh-environment builds.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.PdbCurrentHeadroom
member.summary: PDB current rating headroom above total system peak current (multiplier). PDB carries all motor + avionics current simultaneously. 1.30 allows for wiring imbalance and transient spikes.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.ReceiverRangeMargin
member.summary: Minimum control-link range margin over mission range (multiplier). 1.50 = receiver must cover at least 150 % of stated mission range. Accounts for RF environment degradation, antenna orientation, and the need to maintain positive control during a return-to-home event.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.TelemetryRangeMargin
member.summary: Minimum telemetry-link range margin over mission range (multiplier). 1.25 = telemetry must cover at least 125 % of stated mission range. Telemetry is advisory (not safety-critical) so a tighter margin is acceptable compared with the control link.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.GpsAccuracyMappingM
member.summary: Required GPS positional accuracy (CEP50, metres) for mapping and photogrammetry missions. 2.5 m is achievable with multi-constellation GNSS without RTK. RTK modules (<0.1 m) should be preferred when present in the database.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.GpsAccuracySurveillanceM
member.summary: Required GPS positional accuracy for surveillance and inspection missions. 5 m CEP50 is sufficient for loiter and area-observation tasks.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.GpsAccuracyGeneralM
member.summary: Required GPS positional accuracy for general-purpose missions (delivery, patrol, search-and-rescue, general). 10 m CEP50 aligns with standard single-band GNSS performance.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.GpsOptionalRacingRangeKm
member.summary: Mission range threshold below which a GPS module becomes optional for racing builds (acro / line-of-sight closed-course flying). Below 0.5 km, a racing pilot typically flies without GPS assistance.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.TelemetryOptionalRangeKm
member.summary: Mission range threshold below which a telemetry radio is considered optional. Short-range racing on a closed course does not require live MAVLink telemetry.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.FcMinLoopRateRacingHz
member.summary: Minimum gyro loop rate (Hz) a flight controller must support for racing missions. 4 kHz (250 µs loop) is the accepted minimum for locked-in FPV racing performance on current hardware.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.HarshEnvironmentMinTempC
member.summary: Minimum operating temperature (°C) a component must tolerate when the operating environment is Harsh (cold / industrial outdoor). −20 °C covers most northern-latitude outdoor UAV deployments.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.CameraMinResolutionMappingMp
member.summary: Minimum camera resolution (megapixels) for mapping and photogrammetry missions. 12 MP provides adequate GSD at typical survey altitudes (50–120 m AGL) with most modern sensors. Increase to 20 MP for high-detail survey work.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.CameraMinResolutionInspectionMp
member.summary: Minimum camera resolution (megapixels) for non-thermal inspection missions. 20 MP enables close-detail crop inspection without field revisits.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.MinReceiverChannelCount
member.summary: Minimum PWM / digital channel count required on a receiver for a standard build. 8 channels covers: throttle, roll, pitch, yaw, arm, flight-mode, RTH, payload trigger.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.GpsFallbackCurrentA
member.summary: Fallback current draw (A) for a GPS module when the database row does not populate CurrentDrawA. Dual-band modules typically draw 60–100 mA; 0.12 A is a conservative upper bound.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.TelemetryFallbackCurrentA
F:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.CameraFallbackCurrentA
member.summary: Fallback current draw (A) for an FPV or survey camera. Wide range in practice (0.3–1.5 A); 0.8 A used as a mid-range placeholder for energy budget awareness.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.SelectComponents(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Runs the full selection pipeline for Tasks 7, 8, and 9: MTOW -> Thrust -> Motors -> Propellers -> Power budget -> Battery -> ESCs -> PDB -> Avionics budget -> FC -> GPS -> Telemetry -> Receiver -> Camera.
Each intermediate result is stored on SelectionResult so the UI can display a transparent breakdown of every sizing decision made.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.EstimateMtow(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Estimates Maximum Take-Off Weight (MTOW) in grams via fixed-point iteration.
The battery mass and MTOW are mutually dependent: heavier UAV -> more power needed -> bigger battery -> heavier UAV
The loop iterates until |MTOW_i - MTOW_{i-1}| <= 1 g (typically 3-5 passes).
Per-iteration formula: MTOW_i = (structural_mass + battery_mass_i) x SafetyFactor P_hover = MTOW_i x 10 W / 100 g [empirical for 5"-7" quads] E_total = P_hover x endurance_h x 1.20 [+20% non-hover overhead] usable_density = LipoEnergyDensityWhPerKg x DoD [Wh/kg usable] battery_mass_{i+1} = (E_total / usable_density) x 1000 [Wh -> g]

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.CalculateThrustRequirement(Drone_Designer.Core.Services.MtowEstimate,System.Int32)
member.summary:
Derives required thrust per motor.
Formula: Total thrust (gf) = MTOW_g x TWR Per-motor thrust = Total thrust / motor_count
Units are gram-force (gf) throughout: 1 gf = 0.00981 N. Motor datasheets rate static thrust in gf, so gf avoids unit conversion when comparing against repository values.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.SelectMotors(Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ThrustRequirement,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Queries the repository for motors that: - Produce >= ThrustPerMotorGf static thrust at nominal voltage. - Accept the estimated pack voltage within their operating range. - Have an IP rating > 0 when OperatingEnvironment = Harsh.
Sorted by: thrust-per-watt DESC (efficiency priority), then mass ASC. Returns up to 5 candidates; UI or user picks the final one.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.SelectPropellers(System.Collections.Generic.List{Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentSpecs},Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Selects propellers compatible with the top-ranked motor.
Filters: - Diameter within motor's supported prop range. - Diameter <= frame clearance estimate.
Sort: pitch ASC for endurance (lower pitch = lower current per RPM); pitch DESC for racing (higher pitch = higher top speed). Falls back to nearest-diameter match if no prop passes all filters.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.CalculatePowerBudget(System.Collections.Generic.List{Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentSpecs},Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ThrustRequirement,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Calculates the complete power and current budget for the UAV. All downstream power-system selections (battery, ESC, PDB) derive from this object.
----------------------------------------------------------------------- CURRENT DRAW MODEL -----------------------------------------------------------------------
Peak motor current (full throttle): I_motor_peak = motor.MaxCurrentA [datasheet value] Fallback if MaxCurrentA = 0: I_motor_peak = motor.MaxPowerW / NominalVoltageV [P = VI rearranged] Last resort: I_motor_peak = ThrustPerMotorGf / 10 [~1 A per 10 gf empirical]
Hover motor current (per motor): I_hover = I_peak x HoverCurrentFraction (= 0.45)
Total peak current (ESC and PDB sizing): I_peak_total = (I_motor_peak x motor_count) + I_avionics
Average flight current (battery capacity sizing): I_avg_total = (I_hover x motor_count) + I_avionics
NOTE: I_avionics uses the flat AvionicCurrentDrawA constant (3.0 A) here. After Task 9 runs, AvionicsBudget.RealizedCurrentA contains the actual summed figure. For a tighter power budget, call CalculatePowerBudget() a second time substituting RealizedCurrentA for AvionicCurrentDrawA.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.SelectBatteries(Drone_Designer.Core.Services.PowerBudget,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Selects LiPo battery packs from the repository.
Hard filter criteria (all must pass): 1. LipoCellCount = power.CellCount [exact voltage match] 2. CapacityMah >= power.RequiredCapacityMah [endurance requirement] 3. ContinuousCRating >= power.RequiredCRating [peak current capability] 4. MassGrams <= mtow.EstimatedBatteryMassGrams x 1.15 [15% mass tolerance]
Sort priority: 1. |CapacityMah - RequiredCapacityMah| ASC (closest fit avoids dead weight) 2. ContinuousCRating DESC (more headroom = safer under burst loads) 3. MassGrams ASC (tie-break by weight)

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.SelectEscs(System.Collections.Generic.List{Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentSpecs},Drone_Designer.Core.Services.PowerBudget,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Selects Electronic Speed Controllers — one spec covers all motor positions since all motors are identical in a typical symmetric multirotor.
Sizing formula: I_esc_required = motor.MaxCurrentA x EscCurrentHeadroom (x 1.25)
Hard filter criteria: 1. ContinuousCurrentA >= I_esc_required 2. OperatingVoltageMaxV >= power.NominalVoltageV 3. IsAllInOne = False (4-in-1 boards excluded; handled separately if needed)
Sort: lowest current rating that still qualifies (avoids over-specced mass), then lowest mass.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.SelectPdb(Drone_Designer.Core.Services.PowerBudget,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Selects a Power Distribution Board (PDB) sized for the full system.
Sizing formula: I_pdb_required = TotalPeakCurrentA x PdbCurrentHeadroom (x 1.30)
Hard filter criteria: 1. ContinuousCurrentA >= I_pdb_required 2. OperatingVoltageMaxV >= power.NominalVoltageV 3. MotorOutputCount >= power.MotorCount
Sort: 1. HasBecOutput DESC (integrated BEC preferred; reduces part count) 2. MassGrams ASC

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.BuildAvionicsBudget(Drone_Designer.Core.Services.PowerBudget,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Packages avionics-relevant context into an AvionicsBudget for use by all Task 9 selection steps.
RealizedCurrentA is left at 0 here; it is populated by TallyRealizedAvionicsCurrent() after all avionics are chosen.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.SelectFlightController(Drone_Designer.Core.Services.PowerBudget,Drone_Designer.Core.Services.AvionicsBudget,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Selects a flight controller (FC) compatible with the mission profile, pack voltage, and operating environment.
----------------------------------------------------------------------- REQUIRED ComponentSpecs properties (add to ComponentSpecs.vb): MaxLoopRateHz As Integer — peak gyro loop rate (e.g. 8000) HasBlackbox As Boolean — integrated data logger SupportedProtocols As String — comma-separated: "SBUS,CRSF,DSHOT600" OperatingVoltageMinV As Double — already present (Task 7) OperatingVoltageMaxV As Double — already present (Task 7) OperatingTempMinC As Double — minimum rated temperature (°C) CurrentDrawA As Double — board power consumption at 5 V (A) -----------------------------------------------------------------------
Voltage compatibility rule: Most FCs run at 5 V from a BEC. A build always has a BEC (from PDB or ESC), so any FC with OperatingVoltageMaxV >= 4.5 V is acceptable. High-voltage FCs (H7, F7) may accept pack voltage directly (OperatingVoltageMaxV >= NominalVoltageV) — these are also included.
Mission-specific hard filters: Racing → MaxLoopRateHz >= FcMinLoopRateRacingHz (4 kHz) Mapping, Survey, Inspection → HasBlackbox = True Harsh environment → OperatingTempMinC <= HarshEnvironmentMinTempC (-20 °C)
Sort: Racing → MaxLoopRateHz DESC, then MassGrams ASC Mapping → HasBlackbox DESC, then MaxLoopRateHz DESC Default → MassGrams ASC (smallest capable board)
Returns up to 3 candidates. Throws if no match is found.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.SelectGpsModule(Drone_Designer.Core.Services.AvionicsBudget,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Selects a GNSS module meeting the positional accuracy tier required by the mission profile.
----------------------------------------------------------------------- REQUIRED ComponentSpecs properties (add to ComponentSpecs.vb): PositionalAccuracyCep50M As Double — CEP50 accuracy in metres (e.g. 1.5) UpdateRateHz As Double — maximum position update rate (e.g. 10.0) HasCompass As Boolean — integrated magnetometer OperatingTempMinC As Double — minimum rated temperature (°C) CurrentDrawA As Double — typical draw (A); use GpsFallbackCurrentA if 0 -----------------------------------------------------------------------
Accuracy tiers keyed to MissionProfile: Mapping, Survey → <= 2.5 m (GpsAccuracyMappingM) Surveillance, Inspection → <= 5.0 m (GpsAccuracySurveillanceM) All others → <= 10.0 m (GpsAccuracyGeneralM)
GPS is considered optional for Racing missions with RangeKm < 0.5 km (acro / line-of-sight closed-course flying). In that case an empty list is returned without throwing an exception.
HasCompass filter: Required for all profiles except Racing (acro pilots often mount GPS without compass to avoid motor interference).
Sort: PositionalAccuracyCep50M ASC, UpdateRateHz DESC, MassGrams ASC. Returns up to 3 candidates.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.SelectTelemetryRadio(Drone_Designer.Core.Services.AvionicsBudget,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Selects a ground/air telemetry radio pair capable of covering the mission range with a 25 % link margin.
----------------------------------------------------------------------- REQUIRED ComponentSpecs properties (add to ComponentSpecs.vb): MaxRangeKm As Double — rated open-field range (km) FrequencyBandMhz As Double — centre frequency: 433, 868, 915, or 2400 MaxTxPowerMw As Double — transmit power (mW) CurrentDrawA As Double — average Tx current; use TelemetryFallbackCurrentA if 0 OperatingTempMinC As Double — minimum rated temperature (°C) -----------------------------------------------------------------------
Range filter: MaxRangeKm >= specs.RangeKm x TelemetryRangeMargin (1.25)
Telemetry is optional when: - Mission profile is Racing AND RangeKm < TelemetryOptionalRangeKm (1.0 km) In that case an empty list is returned without throwing.
Sort: MaxRangeKm ASC (smallest radio that qualifies — minimises mass/power), then MassGrams ASC. Returns up to 3 candidates.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.SelectReceiver(Drone_Designer.Core.Services.AvionicsBudget,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Selects an RC receiver with adequate control range and channel count.
----------------------------------------------------------------------- REQUIRED ComponentSpecs properties (add to ComponentSpecs.vb): MaxRangeKm As Double — rated open-field control range (km) ChannelCount As Integer — number of proportional/digital channels ProtocolName As String — e.g. "SBUS", "CRSF", "ELRS", "DSM2", "IBUS" CurrentDrawA As Double — board current draw (A) -----------------------------------------------------------------------
Hard filters: 1. MaxRangeKm >= specs.RangeKm x ReceiverRangeMargin (1.50) The 50 % margin provides headroom for return-to-home after link degradation at maximum range. 2. ChannelCount >= MinReceiverChannelCount (8)
Protocol preference for Racing builds: ExpressLRS (ELRS) and Crossfire (CRSF) offer <5 ms latency and are strongly preferred for racing. These are boosted in sort order using a computed priority flag.
Sort: 1. LowLatencyProtocol DESC (ELRS/CRSF priority for Racing) 2. MaxRangeKm ASC (smallest sufficient range = lightest antenna) 3. ChannelCount DESC (more channels = more future flexibility) 4. MassGrams ASC
Returns up to 3 candidates. Throws if no match is found.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.SelectCamera(Drone_Designer.Core.Services.AvionicsBudget,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Selects a camera or imaging sensor matched to the mission type.
----------------------------------------------------------------------- REQUIRED ComponentSpecs properties (add to ComponentSpecs.vb): ResolutionMp As Double — sensor resolution in megapixels HorizontalFovDeg As Double — horizontal field of view (degrees) IsStabilized As Boolean — integrated gimbal or OIS IsThermographic As Boolean — thermal / infrared sensor IsLowLatency As Boolean — True for FPV analogue/digital cameras with <30 ms video latency CurrentDrawA As Double — power draw (A); use CameraFallbackCurrentA if 0 -----------------------------------------------------------------------
Per-profile logic:
Delivery → No camera required. Returns empty list (no exception thrown).
Racing → Requires IsLowLatency = True (pilot needs real-time video). Sorted by HorizontalFovDeg DESC (wider FOV = better situational awareness) then MassGrams ASC. Returns empty list if none found (FPV camera may be out-of-scope for some database configurations).
Mapping, Survey → Requires ResolutionMp >= CameraMinResolutionMappingMp (12 MP). Prefers IsStabilized = True (reduces motion blur on overlap images). Sorted by ResolutionMp DESC then IsStabilized DESC. Throws if no qualifying camera is found.
Inspection → Requires ResolutionMp >= CameraMinResolutionInspectionMp (20 MP) OR IsThermographic = True (either suffices for detailed inspection). Sorted by IsThermographic DESC (thermal first for defect detection), then ResolutionMp DESC. Throws if no qualifying camera is found.
Surveillance → Any camera; sorted by ResolutionMp DESC for maximum detail.
SearchAndRescue → Thermal preferred; any camera accepted as fallback. Sorted by IsThermographic DESC then ResolutionMp DESC.
General / other → Any camera accepted; sorted by ResolutionMp DESC.
Returns up to 3 candidates.

Sums the actual current draw of the top-ranked avionics candidate in each category and writes the total to AvionicsBudget.RealizedCurrentA.
If a component's CurrentDrawA field is 0 (not populated in the database), a category-level fallback constant is used so the figure is always a meaningful estimate rather than zero.
CurrentDeltaA = RealizedCurrentA - BudgetedCurrentA is also computed. A positive delta means avionics draw more than the flat 3 A assumed in Task 8; a negative delta indicates the build is lighter than estimated.
The UI (SelectionResult.AvionicsBudget) should display both values so the operator can judge whether a second-pass power budget recalculation is warranted (typically only when |CurrentDeltaA| > 1 A).

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.PickCurrentA(System.Collections.Generic.List{Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentSpecs},System.Double)
member.summary: Returns the CurrentDrawA of the first component in the list, or when the list is empty or the property is 0 (not populated).

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.DetermineCellCount(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MotorSpec,Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary:
Determines the optimal LiPo cell count (S rating) for the build.
Decision rules applied in priority order: 1. Heavy-lift (payload > 1 kg) or high-speed (cruise > 20 m/s) => prefer 6S. 2. Racing profile => 4S or 6S based on speed (threshold: 25 m/s). 3. Long range (> 10 km) => prefer 6S for wire current efficiency. 4. Default => 4S (widest ESC/motor compatibility in the hobby market).
Hard cap: motor.OperatingVoltageMaxV limits the result. maxCells = floor(motor.OperatingVoltageMaxV / 3.7) Result = min(preferred_cells, maxCells), floored at 3S.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.EstimateNominalVoltage(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary: Voltage heuristic used during motor filtering (Task 7) before the exact cell count from DetermineCellCount is available. Kept consistent with DetermineCellCount to avoid selecting motors that Task 8 then rejects.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.GetAirframeMass(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns airframe mass estimate for a given motor count. Linearly extrapolates for counts not in the lookup table.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.NormaliseMotorCount(System.Int32)
member.summary: Maps unusual motor counts to the nearest valid multirotor configuration. Valid: 3 (tri), 4 (quad), 6 (hex), 8 (octo), 12 (dodeca). Default: 4.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.EstimateMaxPropDiameter(System.Int32)
member.summary:
Estimates maximum propeller diameter (inches) within frame geometry clearance.
Formula (symmetric X-frame): arm_length (mm) = frame_diagonal / sqrt(2) max_prop_radius (mm) = arm_length / 1.3 [30% tip clearance] max_prop_diam (in) = (max_prop_radius x 2) / 25.4

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.ComponentSelectionEngine.ValidateMissionSpecs(Drone_Designer.Core.Models.MissionSpecs)
member.summary: Validates minimum required fields on MissionSpecs before any calculation. Throws descriptive ArgumentExceptions suitable for direct display in WinForms.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.AvionicsBudget
member.summary:
Avionics power and range context produced by Task 9 (Step 9).
BudgetedCurrentA = the flat 3 A estimate used in Task 8's PowerBudget. RealizedCurrentA = sum of actual CurrentDrawA values from selected avionics components (populated by TallyRealizedAvionicsCurrent). CurrentDeltaA = RealizedCurrentA - BudgetedCurrentA. |Delta| > 1 A signals the operator to consider a second-pass power budget recalculation.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.AvionicsBudget.BudgetedCurrentA
member.summary: Flat avionics current used in Task 8 PowerBudget (A).

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.AvionicsBudget.RealizedCurrentA
member.summary: Actual summed current from selected avionics (A); set by Task 9.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.Core.Services.AvionicsBudget.CurrentDeltaA
member.summary: RealizedCurrentA minus BudgetedCurrentA (A). Positive = over budget.

member.summary: Pack nominal voltage (V) — from PowerBudget, forwarded for convenience.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.MainForm.OnSelectComponentsAsync(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Async handler wired to btnSelectComponents.Click. Pipeline: Validate → Build specs → Engine on background thread → Display results. Task.Run keeps the UI thread free during the CPU-bound selection pass; all UI updates happen after Await, which resumes on the UI thread.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.MainForm.ValidateFormInputs
member.summary: Validates all form controls before they reach the engine. Returns a list of plain-English error strings; an empty list means pass. Checks are ordered top-to-bottom matching the visual layout.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.MainForm.BuildMissionSpecs
member.summary:
Reads every form control and constructs a fully-populated object ready for the selection engine.
UNIT CONVERSIONS (applied here, not in the engine): Endurance : hours → minutes (×60) Speeds : km/h → m/s (÷3.6)
DUAL PROPERTIES: Some properties are set twice — once for the legacy MissionSpecs enum (Profile, Environment) and once for the engine-facing alias property (MissionProfile, OperatingEnvironment). Both must be set so that both the UI and engine see consistent values.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.MainForm.DisplaySelectionResult(Drone_Designer.Core.Services.SelectionResult)
member.summary:
Flattens the engine's into a list and binds it to the output DataGridView. Updates the summary footer and highlights recommended rows.
Category order matches the engine pipeline (Task 7 → 8 → 9): Motors → Propellers → Batteries → ESCs → PDB → Flight Controllers → GPS → Telemetry Radios → Receivers → Cameras.
Within each category: first row = "Recommended" (green); remaining rows = "Alternative N" (standard background).

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.MainForm.AppendRows(System.Collections.Generic.List{Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentDisplayRow},System.Collections.Generic.List{Drone_Designer.Core.Models.ComponentSpecs},System.String)
member.summary: Appends display rows for one component category to the master row list. First entry = "Recommended"; subsequent entries = "Alternative N". Empty lists (e.g., no camera for Delivery builds) are silently skipped.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.ConfigManager
member.summary:
Manages application-wide configuration settings for the Drone Designer tool. Reads from and writes to a JSON config file (DroneDesigner.config.json) located next to the executable. Access settings via ConfigManager.Settings from any module.
Config file is auto-created with defaults on first run if missing.

member.name: F:Drone_Designer.ConfigManager.CONFIG_FILE_NAME
member.summary: The name of the JSON config file on disk.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.ConfigManager.Settings
member.summary: Returns the loaded application settings. Loads from disk on first access. Thread-safe for read scenarios typical of a WinForms desktop app.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.ConfigManager.ConfigFilePath
member.summary: Full path to the config file being used (next to the executable).

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ConfigManager.Load
member.summary: Loads settings from the JSON config file. If the file does not exist, creates it with default values. Throws ConfigurationException if the file is present but malformed.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ConfigManager.Save
member.summary: Saves the current in-memory settings back to the JSON config file. Call this after programmatically changing any Settings property.

member.name: M:Drone_Designer.ConfigManager.Reload
member.summary: Forces a reload from disk, discarding any unsaved in-memory changes. Useful if the user edits the config file while the application is running.

member.name: T:Drone_Designer.AppSettings
member.summary: Strongly-typed model for all application settings. All paths may be absolute or relative to the executable directory. Serialized to / deserialized from JSON by ConfigManager.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.AppSettings.ComponentsDatabasePath
member.summary: Path to the components database file (JSON). Example: "Resources\components.json"

member.summary: Root installation directory of SolidWorks. Example: "C:\Program Files\SOLIDWORKS Corp\SOLIDWORKS" Used by SolidWorksAutomation.vb when locating the COM server.

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.AppSettings.TemplatePartsDirectory
member.summary: Directory containing parametric SolidWorks template parts (.SLDPRT / .SLDASM). Module 2 reads from here when editing pre-designed templates. Example: "C:\DroneDesigner\Templates"

member.summary: Directory where generated CAD files (parts and assemblies) are written. Example: "C:\DroneDesigner\Output"

member.summary: Target SolidWorks version string used when selecting macros or API calls. Example: "2023", "2024" Macros are version-sensitive; keep this in sync with the installed version.

member.summary: Path to the application log file. Example: "Logs\DroneDesigner.log"

member.name: P:Drone_Designer.AppSettings.LogLevel
member.summary: Minimum log level written to file. Accepted values: "Debug", "Info", "Warning", "Error"
